description: Quantitative move-probability priors per narrative archetype (deterministic, from all-narratives.json). Enriched by the operational workflow with detection/regime/gate fields into narrative-signals.json.

signals.name: Flagship AI-Agent Token Launch Pump (reflexive parabola)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours; parabola plays out over days to ~2 weeks
signals.typical_duration: 1-3 weeks of run-up, then weeks-to-months of decay
signals.recurrence: Clustered Oct 2024 - Jan 2025; recurs whenever a new flagship narrative coin appears
leading_signals: viral X/Twitter mentions of an AI agent
association/endorsement by a known VC/founder (a16z, Andreessen)
pump.fun coin crossing $100M then higher mcap
Virtuals bonding curve nearing 42,000 VIRTUAL graduation
rapid holder-count growth
exchange listing announcements (Binance/Coinbase)

signals.name: AI-Sector Rotation + Reflexive Crash (correlated cohort unwind)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours) on the shock; cascade over days
signals.typical_duration: Drawdown unwinds over weeks; sector spent months below peak
signals.recurrence: The full cohort crash was a single Q1-2025 regime change; smaller correlated drawdowns recur on any AI macro shock
leading_signals: smart-money / top-PnL wallets distributing
sector aggregate mcap stalling after parabola
negative AI macro headline (DeepSeek)
declining new launches / launchpad volume
funding rates flipping / OI unwind
BTC dominance rising vs alts

signals.name: Launchpad Graduation Pumps & AI-Infra Token Consolidation
signals.typical_lag: immediate on graduation; days-to-weeks on merger re-rating
signals.typical_duration: Graduation pumps fade within days; merger re-rating persists weeks-to-months
signals.recurrence: Graduations were near-daily on Virtuals during the Nov 2024 - Jan 2025 boom; mergers are rare one-offs
leading_signals: Virtuals bonding curve approaching 42,000 VIRTUAL
pending Uniswap liquidity deployment
merger/consolidation announcement
token conversion-ratio disclosure
exchange support announcements for the new ticker

signals.name: Idiosyncratic Agent/Protocol Events (hacks, subnet launches, dTAO)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours) on hacks; launch-day spike then multi-day dip on subnet alphas
signals.typical_duration: Hack drops partly recover in days; subnet-launch dips persist until emissions re-equilibrate
signals.recurrence: Hacks are sporadic; dTAO subnet alpha launches recur continuously since Feb 2025
leading_signals: unusual agent wallet activity / dashboard access
deleted-account or anomalous agent posts
new Bittensor subnet registration
alpha-token liquidity-pool creation
TAO staking redistribution toward a new subnet

signals.name: BTC dominance regime (risk-on/off rotation within crypto)
signals.typical_lag: regime-scale (weeks-to-months); not an intraday signal
signals.typical_duration: months per regime leg
signals.recurrence: every cycle: BTC-led accumulation -> mid-cycle ETH/large-cap rotation -> late-cycle alt/meme blow-off -> risk-off flight back to BTC
leading_signals: BTC.D level and 30-day slope
Altcoin Season Index (>75 alt-season / <25 BTC season)
ETH/BTC ratio and its 50/200-day MA crosses
TOTAL2 / TOTAL ratio (alt share of market cap)
BTC spot-ETF net flows vs alt-ETF/alt-fund flows
days since last confirmed alt-season

signals.name: Alt-season extreme as a late-cycle top signal
signals.typical_lag: the top signal is coincident-to-leading by days/weeks; confirmation on the dominance reversal
signals.typical_duration: the unwind runs the length of the ensuing bear (months-to-a-year)
signals.recurrence: once per cycle at the euphoria peak
leading_signals: Altcoin Season Index spiking >75
BTC.D making a multi-month low
memecoin/low-cap volume share at extremes (see [[memecoin-mania]])
ETH/BTC and alt/BTC ratios parabolic then rolling over
funding/leverage extremes across alts

signals.name: Post-Halving Bull Cycle (the 12-18 month parabolic run)
signals.typical_lag: weeks to months — the parabolic phase typically begins 3-6 months after the halving
signals.typical_duration: 12-18 months from halving to cycle top
signals.recurrence: once per ~4-year halving cycle; 4 occurrences 2012-2024
leading_signals: halving event occurs (block height multiple of 210,000)
stock-to-flow ratio doubles
miner reserves declining
BTC reclaims prior cycle ATH
rising spot ETF net inflows (2024+ cycle)
funding rates turning persistently positive

signals.name: Pre-Halving Rally / Buy-the-Rumor
signals.typical_lag: builds over 6-12 months before the halving date
signals.typical_duration: 6-12 months pre-event
signals.recurrence: once per ~4-year cycle, ahead of each halving
leading_signals: halving date within 12 months
rising Google search interest in 'bitcoin halving'
accelerating spot ETF inflows (2024+)
BTC trending above 200-day moving average
improving funding/open-interest

signals.name: Post-Cycle Bear Market (the deflationary back half of the 4-year cycle)
signals.typical_lag: begins immediately after the cycle top (~18mo post-halving)
signals.typical_duration: ~12 months of decline into the cycle low, roughly the second half of the 4-year cycle
signals.recurrence: once per ~4-year cycle, following each bull-market top
leading_signals: BTC loses 200-day moving average after a parabolic run
funding rates flip persistently negative
exchange net-inflows spike (holders moving to sell)
failure to make new highs for >8 weeks after a blowoff top
long-term-holder distribution rising

signals.name: Treasury-Adoption Announcement (company pivots to crypto reserve)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (same session, often pre-market)
signals.typical_duration: stock pop intraday-to-days; narrative read-across can persist weeks; coin effect <24h
signals.recurrence: very frequent in 2024-2025 — dozens of copycats; cluster events around each new high-profile entrant
affected_scope: other treasury-stock peers (MSTR, SMLR, MARA, SBET)
leading_signals: 8-K / press release announcing treasury policy adoption
board approval of crypto-as-reserve
convertible-note or ATM equity raise filed days before
small beaten-down small-cap with a crypto-aligned chairman
sudden short-interest spike then squeeze

signals.name: Sustained Accumulation / mNAV-Premium Flywheel (ongoing buys funded at a premium)
signals.typical_lag: diffuse — builds over weeks/quarters rather than per-event
signals.typical_duration: persists as long as mNAV > ~1 and capital markets stay open (multi-quarter)
signals.recurrence: continuous through 2024-2025 bull phase; weekly purchase 8-Ks from MSTR and peers
leading_signals: mNAV premium > 1 (especially > 2)
fresh ATM/convertible/preferred raise filings
weekly Monday MSTR purchase 8-Ks
rising 'BTC Yield'/coin-per-share metric
growing count of new treasury entrants (crowding)
exchange outflows to corporate custody addresses

signals.name: Distribution / Forced Selling / mNAV-Discount Unwind (the flywheel in reverse)
signals.typical_lag: sentiment dip immediate; systemic forced-selling plays out over days-to-weeks
signals.typical_duration: single-sale dip hours-to-days; mNAV-unwind regimes persist weeks-to-months
signals.recurrence: rare for outright sales (Strategy held through all of 2023-2025); systemic discount-unwind episodes clustered in late 2025
affected_scope: treasury-stock cohort (MSTR, MARA, SBET, BMNR, Metaplanet)
leading_signals: mNAV falling toward / below 1.0
CEO comments about 'conditions to sell'
treasury stock down >50% YoY while coin down less (premium gone)
debt/preferred coverage stress, covenant headlines
treasury-stock share-buyback announcements (cash drain)
'one in three treasuries below NAV' breadth
rising correlation of treasury stocks crashing together

signals.name: Narrative ignition / TVL land-grab (yield-farming, restaking points, RWA hype)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to days for the flagship token; days-to-weeks for read-across into peer tokens
signals.typical_duration: weeks to a few months for the acute pump; the narrative regime can persist 1-2 quarters
signals.recurrence: roughly one major sector-defining wave every 12-24 months (2020 DeFi Summer, 2021 Curve/L1, 2023-24 restaking, 2024 RWA)
leading_signals: sharp TVL inflow before token price moves
launch of a points/airdrop program
first major institutional validation (e.g. BlackRock BUIDL)
rising social/search interest in the meta
copycat protocols launching same week

signals.name: Points/airdrop 'sell the news' (TGE distribution dump)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours to first 7 days post-claim)
signals.typical_duration: the acute dump is days; the bleed often continues weeks-to-months as cliffs/emissions add supply
signals.recurrence: every major TGE in a hot meta — dozens per cycle; highly repeatable
leading_signals: TGE/claim date announcement
large airdrop allocation %
high FDV vs low initial float
pre-market/IOU price far above implied float value
negative perp funding pre-listing
Dune dashboards showing rapid claim+sell

signals.name: Vote-bribe / liquidity wars (Curve wars, veTokenomics)
signals.typical_lag: days-to-weeks during accumulation; the structural decay plays out over many months
signals.typical_duration: the war phase lasts months; token decay persists for years post-peak
signals.recurrence: the canonical instance was 2021-22; the veTokenomics template recurs across protocols (Balancer, Velodrome, etc.) but rarely at the same scale
leading_signals: rising bribe APRs
increasing lock ratios / falling liquid float
a new protocol entering the war (buying votes)
meta-governance TVL inflows (Convex)

signals.name: DeFi reflexive deleveraging / contagion (exploits, founder-collateral, yield unwind)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes to hours) for the levered token; hours-to-days for contagion read-across
signals.typical_duration: acute drop is hours-to-days; sentiment/TVL recovery can take weeks-to-months
signals.recurrence: multiple times per cycle — exploits and forced unwinds are frequent in DeFi
leading_signals: a single large borrow position near liquidation (e.g. founder collateral)
stablecoin/LST depeg starting
exploit/hack headline
spiking lending utilization
TVL outflow acceleration
negative funding flush

signals.name: Acute Insolvency / Bank-Run Freeze
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours — the token gaps down within minutes of the trigger; BTC/broad-market reacts within hours to 1-2 days
signals.typical_duration: Token impact is permanent (near-total loss). Broad-market acute drop plays out over 3-10 days, with a depressed regime lasting weeks to months.
signals.recurrence: Episodic but recurring across every cycle — roughly one major instance per bear-market liquidity crunch (2014 Gox, 2022 Celsius/FTX). Smaller exchange freezes occur more frequently.
affected_scope: ecosystem tokens tied to the failed entity
leading_signals: Leaked balance sheet showing native-token concentration (CoinDesk's FTX/Alameda report on 2022-11-02)
A large rival publicly announcing it will dump its holdings of the platform's token (CZ's 2022-11-06 tweet)
Anomalous exchange outflows / large BTC moving off the platform before the halt
Token trading at a discount on the affected venue vs. other exchanges
Withdrawal delays / 'temporary pause due to extreme market conditions' language
Negative funding and rising borrow rates on the token

signals.name: Contagion Cascade / Counterparty Domino
signals.typical_lag: days to weeks — the first default is acute, but the full cascade unfolds over 1-6 months as each linked entity fails in sequence.
signals.typical_duration: Months. The 2022 cascade ran from the May Luna shock through the November FTX failure and into the January 2023 Genesis bankruptcy — roughly 8 months of grinding decline / suppressed prices.
signals.recurrence: Once per major leverage build-up / bear cycle. The 2022 episode is the canonical full cascade; isolated defaults that don't chain (single fund blow-ups) are more frequent.
leading_signals: A large fund missing a margin call / a public notice of default issued to it (Voyager's default notice to 3AC, Jun 2022)
A widening stETH or GBTC discount (forced sellers exiting locked collateral)
A 'systemically important' token already collapsing (LUNA in May 2022 preceded the lender failures)
Lenders cutting yields / pausing new deposits / seeking emergency lines (Celsius, BlockFi raising rescue capital)
Falling aggregate open interest as leverage is purged
Rumors of insolvency clustering across multiple named firms within days

signals.name: Estate Distribution / Repayment Supply Overhang
signals.typical_lag: Anticipatory — dips occur on the announcement/on-chain-movement, often days to weeks BEFORE actual distribution; repayment dates are frequently delayed, resetting the overhang.
signals.typical_duration: A persistent multi-month overhang punctuated by sharp 1-3 day dips on each fresh trigger; individual dips fade within days as feared selling fails to fully materialize.
signals.recurrence: Specific to large defunct-exchange estates (Mt Gox is the dominant example, ~140,000 BTC). Recurs each time the estate moves coins or a deadline approaches; the Mt Gox repayment deadline has been repeatedly pushed (most recently to October 2026).
affected_scope: the named coin held by the estate
leading_signals: Trustee announces a repayment start date or deadline (Mt Gox notices)
On-chain trackers flag movement of dormant estate wallets (e.g., $739M / $1B Mt Gox BTC transfers)
Creditor-claim secondary prices rising (claim buyers front-running)
Coinciding overhang from other forced sellers (German government BTC sales in summer 2024)

signals.name: DeFi protocol exploit (governance/native token crash)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours (price reacts within minutes of the exploit tx being flagged)
signals.typical_duration: days to weeks; partial recovery if funds are returned/socialized, permanent impairment if protocol dies
signals.recurrence: very high — dozens per year across DeFi; the single most frequent crypto bearish catalyst
affected_scope: directly composable protocols (lenders/pools exposed to the victim)
leading_signals: large anomalous outflow from protocol contracts (on-chain netflow spike)
security-firm/whitehat alert tweets before price fully reacts
TVL collapse on DeFiLlama
spike in DEX sell volume of the governance token
founder over-collateralized loan at liquidation risk (e.g. Curve/Aave)
third-party security-risk ratings / 'tokens to avoid' lists flagging the protocol (e.g. Mudrex)

signals.name: Cross-chain bridge exploit (ecosystem L1/token drag-down)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to a few hours
signals.typical_duration: days; bounce often once a backer recapitalizes, but ecosystem narrative damage can persist weeks
signals.recurrence: high in 2021-2022 (bridge era); structurally fewer as bridges hardened, but still recurs
leading_signals: anomalous bridge contract drain (large single mint/withdraw)
wrapped-asset depeg vs underlying
ecosystem TVL outflow
backer/foundation 'we will make users whole' statement (marks the bounce)
spike in L1 perp funding flipping negative

signals.name: Centralized exchange hack (market-wide sentiment shock, mean-reverting)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes) for the headline; full sentiment effect over hours
signals.typical_duration: hours to a few days; rapid recovery once solvency is reassured
signals.recurrence: medium — a handful of major CEX hacks per cycle (Mt. Gox, KuCoin, Bybit), but each is large
leading_signals: abnormal large outflow from a known exchange cold wallet
exchange pauses withdrawals
spike in stablecoin inflows / flight to BTC dominance
stolen-asset (e.g. ETH) being moved to mixers/DEXs
exchange CEO 'all funds are safe / loss covered' statement (marks the bottom)

signals.name: Incentive-Driven Ecosystem Pump (and Fade)
signals.typical_lag: days to weeks after the incentive announcement; reflexive run-up builds over 1-3 months
signals.typical_duration: 2-4 months of outperformance, then multi-month or multi-year mean reversion once incentives taper
signals.recurrence: every cycle - 1-2 major instances per bull market
affected_scope: ecosystem DeFi tokens on that chain
leading_signals: foundation announces 8-9 figure incentive/grant program
TVL inflow acceleration (TVL_7d_pct_change spike)
DEX volume surge relative to chain baseline
stablecoin net inflow to the chain
rising bridge inflows
native token funding rates turning positive

signals.name: Challenger / 'Next Ethereum-Killer' Revival Rotation
signals.typical_lag: rotation builds over weeks to months as the ratio (challenger/ETH) trends; reaction to a single catalyst (e.g. app going viral) can be immediate
signals.typical_duration: a full bull-cycle leg (3-12 months) of outperformance, then ratio mean-reversion
signals.recurrence: 1-2 major rotations per cycle; the named challenger changes each cycle (BSC->SOL/AVAX->SOL/SUI)
affected_scope: the challenger L1 token (SOL, SUI, APT, AVAX)
ecosystem tokens on the challenger chain
leading_signals: challenger/ETH price ratio breaking to new highs
challenger DEX volume overtaking ETH for sustained periods
viral dApp launch driving fee revenue
monthly active addresses surpassing rivals
recovery from a crisis/forced-seller low
media 'flippening' headlines (often a late/contrarian signal)

signals.name: L2 / New-Chain Token Launch & Airdrop Rotation
signals.typical_lag: immediate at TGE (price discovery in first hours); first follow-on rally within weeks
signals.typical_duration: launch pop fades over days-weeks; multi-month downtrend as unlocks/farmed supply sell off
signals.recurrence: every major L2/chain TGE - several per cycle
leading_signals: airdrop snapshot / TGE date announced
farmed on-chain activity spike pre-snapshot
exchange listing announcements
large token unlock dates on the vesting schedule
FDV-to-circulating ratio (high = future sell-pressure)

signals.name: Rotation Unwind / Challenger Ratio Mean-Reversion
signals.typical_lag: the ratio top forms over weeks; the unwind accelerates over days once leverage flushes
signals.typical_duration: months to a full bear leg of underperformance
signals.recurrence: follows every challenger rotation - the back half of each cycle
affected_scope: the previously-leading challenger token (SOL, AVAX, SUI)
leading_signals: challenger/ETH ratio at multi-year highs with negative momentum divergence
extreme positive funding rates / high open interest on the challenger
'flippening' media saturation
decelerating on-chain growth (active addresses, fees rolling over)
broad-market risk-off (BTC dominance rising)
incentive programs tapering

signals.name: Macro Risk-Off Liquidity Shock
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours (intraday on the headline; equities/futures lead by minutes)
signals.typical_duration: 1-7 days for the acute drop; full risk-off regime can persist weeks to months
signals.recurrence: several times per year; clusters around FOMC days, CPI prints, and geopolitical/tariff headlines
leading_signals: DXY breaking out higher
US 2Y/10Y yields spiking
equity VIX > 25 and rising
Nasdaq futures gapping down
BTC-Nasdaq 30d correlation > 0.5
funding rates very positive (crowded longs) into the event
perp open interest at local highs

signals.name: Crypto Leverage Liquidation Cascade (macro-triggered)
signals.typical_lag: minutes to a few hours (mechanical, faster than fundamentals warrant)
signals.typical_duration: hours to 2-3 days; sharp V-shaped partial recovery common within 24-72h
signals.recurrence: 1-3 major cascades per year, plus many smaller ones; triggered by macro headlines or exchange events
leading_signals: perp open interest near all-time highs
funding rates persistently positive / elevated
long/short ratio skewed long
estimated leverage ratio rising
thin order-book depth
a binary macro/headline catalyst pending
stablecoin supply not keeping pace with OI

signals.name: Macro Liquidity / Risk-On Tailwind
signals.typical_lag: immediate on the print, often with anticipatory run-up over prior days/weeks
signals.typical_duration: the headline pop is hours-days; the regime tailwind can run weeks-months
signals.recurrence: several FOMC/CPI prints per year; major easing-cycle inflections every few years
leading_signals: DXY rolling over / making lower highs
Fed funds futures pricing cuts
softening CPI/PCE trend
real yields falling
global M2 / central-bank balance sheets expanding
BTC outperforming on up-days (positive beta)
negative funding flipping positive (shorts covering)

signals.name: Banking/Fiat Stress Flight-to-Bitcoin
signals.typical_lag: hours to a few days (often resolves over a weekend as the banking story develops)
signals.typical_duration: days to a couple of weeks while the banking stress is acute
signals.recurrence: rare — a few times per cycle; requires fiat-system-specific stress
leading_signals: regional-bank equity index falling sharply while BTC holds/rises
a major stablecoin (USDC/DAI) depegging
spike in bank CDS
deposit-flight headlines
BTC-equity correlation breaking down / going negative
stablecoin redemptions and flight to 'unaffected' stablecoins (USDT premium)

signals.name: Celebrity / Influencer Pump on an Existing Memecoin
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes to hours after tweet/event)
signals.typical_duration: hours to a few days; scheduled-event pumps fade within 24h of the event
signals.recurrence: very high during bull markets — Musk alone moved DOGE on a dozen+ occasions across Jan-May 2021 and again in 2024-2026
leading_signals: spike in social mentions / Google Trends for the coin name
scheduled celebrity media appearance announced in advance
run-up in price + volume in days before a hyped event
influencer follower count vs coin float (thin float amplifies)
Robinhood/exchange app outages from order volume

signals.name: Launch-Day Parabolic Token (Politician / Pump.fun / Celebrity Coin)
signals.typical_lag: the pump is immediate (minutes); the dump follows within hours to days
signals.typical_duration: peak within 24h; 80-98% collapse over days to weeks
signals.recurrence: extremely high during froth windows — pump.fun launched thousands daily in late 2024 / early 2025; politician coins clustered Jan-Feb 2025
leading_signals: insider/sniper wallets buying seconds-to-minutes before public announcement
pct of supply held by team/top wallets
no liquidity lock / no vesting
concentrated holder distribution (top-10 wallet share)
explosive first-hour volume with vertical price
official figure directly endorsing (legitimacy halo)

signals.name: Memecoin Season as a Late-Cycle Risk-On Top Signal
signals.typical_lag: froth peak leads the broad top by days to a few weeks
signals.typical_duration: sector drawdown plays out over months; -75% to -80% peak-to-trough in memecoin market cap
signals.recurrence: once per major cycle (2021, late-2024/early-2025); froth peaks recurred each bull phase
leading_signals: memecoin sector market cap at record + as a rising share of total crypto mcap
launchpad (pump.fun) daily revenue at record highs
politician/celebrity coins launching (peak novelty, then novelty exhaustion)
joke coins (Fartcoin) at ATHs
memecoin share of total mcap above a high threshold
negative funding flips / BTC dominance starting to rise

signals.name: TGE / Airdrop Sell-the-News Dump
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes to first 24-72h)
signals.typical_duration: weeks to months; many never reclaim debut price (W, ZK, SCR, BLAST, STRK, IP)
signals.recurrence: Near-universal for VC-backed L1/L2 and infra airdrops 2023-2026. The default expectation for any farmed airdrop.
leading_signals: pre-market/IOU perp price far above implied airdrop FDV
high points-farming TVL with mercenary (non-sticky) capital
low or absent anti-sybil controls / no per-wallet claim cap
large % of supply unlocked at TGE to farmers vs locked to insiders
spike in exchange inflows (deposit netflow z-score) right as claims open
community complaints about allocation fairness pre-launch

signals.name: Launch-Pump-and-Hold (Fair-Launch / Revenue-Backed)
signals.typical_lag: hours to days for initial pump; momentum persists weeks
signals.typical_duration: 2-8 weeks of outperformance, then reverts to market beta
signals.recurrence: Rare. Requires no-VC fair-ish distribution + real revenue. HYPE is the canonical case; most launches do NOT qualify.
leading_signals: zero private investor / VC allocation (no insider cliff)
protocol has real, measurable revenue/fees pre-launch
large % of recipients NOT depositing to exchanges (low sell intent)
small initial float / high reserved-for-future emissions
rising open interest with positive funding but spot leading perps

signals.name: Points-Farming Meta - Pre-Launch Inflow & Post-Airdrop Outflow
signals.typical_lag: inflow builds over weeks/months pre-snapshot; outflow within days of snapshot/claim
signals.typical_duration: TVL/activity reversion over days to weeks post-airdrop
signals.recurrence: Was dominant 2023-mid-2024 (EigenLayer, Blast, restaking/LRTs, Solana farms); structurally decayed after EIGEN disappointment but recurs around every major anticipated launch (Plasma deposits 2025).
leading_signals: announced points program without confirmed tokenomics
TVL/deposit growth far outpacing organic usage (fees-per-TVL falling)
concentration of deposits in 'farmable' assets right before rumored snapshot
on-chain transaction count rising while unique-user retention is low
social mentions of 'farming' + leverage loops (recursive LRT deposits)

signals.name: Revenue-funded buyback flywheel (usage -> token demand)
signals.typical_lag: continuous (block-by-block); compounds over weeks-months
signals.typical_duration: persists while trading volume/fees stay high; reverses on a volume downturn
signals.recurrence: structural/ongoing per protocol with a buyback mandate; a growing 2025-2026 tokenomics meta
leading_signals: protocol fee revenue + buyback wallet on-chain accumulation
token outperformance vs BTC (decoupling)
perp/spot volume trend (the flywheel's fuel)
FDV-to-annualized-revenue multiple
social dominance / attention spikes

signals.name: Pre-IPO / synthetic-asset perp oracle-failure flash crash
signals.typical_lag: instant (single-block oracle print)
signals.typical_duration: minutes (often partial recovery once the bad print clears)
signals.recurrence: rising as pre-IPO/prediction/synthetic-equity perps proliferate (Hyperliquid Ventuals, Bitget preSPCX, etc.)
leading_signals: single-oracle dependency for an illiquid underlying
upcoming corporate action (split/dividend) on the referenced asset
thin order-book depth + high open leverage
low median position margin (retail-skewed)

signals.name: Pre-priced approval 'sell-the-news' then structural re-rating
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes-to-hours on the event); structural inflow effect over weeks-months
signals.typical_duration: sell-off 1-3 weeks; structural re-rating 1-9 months
signals.recurrence: once per product launch (BTC spot ETF, ETH spot ETF); recurs as new vehicles get approved
leading_signals: rising implied volatility / funding rates into the decision date
futures-basis blowout (annualized basis >15-20%)
spike in 'days_to_decision' search/social volume
exchange BTC balances declining pre-event
Polymarket/Kalshi approval-odds approaching ~100%

signals.name: Pro-crypto policy regime shift (election / executive pivot)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (overnight) and continuing for days-to-weeks
signals.typical_duration: weeks to a few months of sustained trend
signals.recurrence: rare / episodic — tied to major political or executive events
leading_signals: prediction-market odds shifting toward the pro-crypto outcome
crypto-linked equities (COIN, MSTR) front-running
rising open interest with positive funding
campaign/policy statements (e.g. Bitcoin Conference promises)

signals.name: Idiosyncratic regulatory de-risking of a named coin
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours)
signals.typical_duration: days to weeks; can mark a durable regime change for that asset
signals.recurrence: episodic per asset; XRP repeatedly re-rated on Ripple-SEC milestones
leading_signals: news/rumor of regulator departure or settlement
litigation docket dates
options skew normalizing for the named asset
the asset's discount-to-peers narrowing
social-volume spike on the specific ticker

signals.name: Legislative framework passage (stablecoin / market-structure)
signals.typical_lag: days (often building over the legislative-debate week)
signals.typical_duration: 1-4 weeks of sector outperformance; can extend if law actually signed
signals.recurrence: per major bill (FIT21, GENIUS, CLARITY); recurs as the legislative pipeline advances
leading_signals: congressional calendar / committee markup dates
whip counts and procedural-vote outcomes
ETH/BTC ratio turning up
stablecoin-issuer and DeFi token relative strength
ETH ETF inflow acceleration

signals.name: Sovereign / state strategic-reserve accumulation
signals.typical_lag: immediate but typically negligible on the headline
signals.typical_duration: per-event minutes-to-hours; structural over years only if buying actually scales
signals.recurrence: rising 2025-2026 — federal SBR EO (Mar 2025), Texas (enacted + first buy), Arizona & New Hampshire (enabling laws, no buys), ARMA federal bill
leading_signals: state/federal strategic-reserve bill introductions and committee markups
state-treasurer investment mandates / appropriations
actual on-chain state or Treasury BTC purchases (size vs daily volume)
count of jurisdictions with enacted reserve authority
authorized annual purchase size vs market depth

signals.name: Regulated domestic access / new-product expansion
signals.typical_lag: structural — builds over weeks-to-months, not a date-stamped spot move
signals.typical_duration: persistent (market-structure change)
signals.recurrence: ongoing as new products/venues are approved
leading_signals: DCM self-certification filings (CFTC non-objection windows)
CFTC/SEC product listing approvals
appellate preemption rulings on event contracts
onshore vs offshore perp funding/OI divergence

signals.name: Sovereign Trading / Mining Ban (China model)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (intraday to 24h); cascade completes over 2-5 days
signals.typical_duration: acute shock 1-2 weeks; full retrace weeks to a few months
signals.recurrence: Recurred repeatedly 2013-2021 (roughly annual China escalations); structurally exhausted after Sep 2021 'all transactions illegal' because China's market share had already been driven near zero
leading_signals: state media or PBOC/NDRC statements signaling tightening
rising funding rates / open interest into the news (fuel for liquidation cascade)
USDT/CNY or local-exchange premium going negative
hashrate concentration in the banning jurisdiction
prior leak/rumor cycle (e.g. Sep 2017 exchange-closure rumors preceded confirmation)

signals.name: US Securities Enforcement (SEC vs token / exchange)
signals.typical_lag: immediate on named token (intraday); delisting-driven leg over days as venues announce suspensions
signals.typical_duration: named-token weakness persists weeks-months while litigation unresolved; sharp reversal on favorable ruling
signals.recurrence: Clustered 2020-2023 (Ripple Dec 2020; Coinbase/Binance June 2023); reversed in 2024-2025 as cases settled or were dropped
leading_signals: Wells notice disclosure (precedes suit by weeks)
SEC press-release calendar / enforcement cadence
exchange listing-risk language in filings
a token appearing on a prior SEC complaint's named-securities list (read-across to peers)
options skew / put demand on COIN equity

signals.name: National Tax / Access Throttling (India / Nigeria model)
signals.typical_lag: local volume reaction immediate-to-days; structural volume decline plays out over weeks once tax/access is effective
signals.typical_duration: persistent — local volume often does not recover (structural, not a dip)
signals.recurrence: Recurring policy-driven events in emerging markets (India 2018/2021/2022, Nigeria 2021/2024); each is largely contained to its jurisdiction
affected_scope: the named coin only on local venues
leading_signals: budget-speech / finance-ministry calendar
central-bank banking-access circulars (RBI-style)
local USDT/fiat premium widening or going negative
domestic exchange volume falling vs offshore
P2P volume migration

signals.name: Deregulation / Crackdown Reversal (the inverse, 2024-2026)
signals.typical_lag: immediate on the named token; broader regime re-rating over weeks-months
signals.typical_duration: can be durable (regime change) rather than a transient pop
signals.recurrence: Episodic, tied to legal milestones and political regime change; clustered 2024-2026
leading_signals: court rulings against the regulator (e.g. Fifth Circuit Tornado Cash ruling)
change in administration / SEC chair (enforcement-cadence regime change)
exchange relisting announcements
settlement / dismissal headlines
litigation-discount narrowing in token's price vs peers

signals.name: Spot ETF launch day / approval 'sell the news'
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours; full drawdown plays out over days
signals.typical_duration: 1-2 weeks to the local trough, then recovery
signals.recurrence: fires once per major product launch (BTC Jan 2024, ETH Jul 2024, HK Apr 2024); a recurring template for every future first-of-kind spot ETF launch (e.g. SOL, XRP)
leading_signals: asset rallies 20-60% in the weeks INTO the approval/launch date
perpetual funding rates elevated / positive heading into launch
options skew bid for calls into the event date
legacy trust (GBTC/ETHE) discount to NAV has collapsed toward zero pre-launch (arbitrage primed to unwind)

signals.name: Sustained daily net inflows (bullish) / net outflows (bearish)
signals.typical_lag: same-day to 1-3 days (flow tends to lead/coincide with price)
signals.typical_duration: as long as the streak persists — days to several weeks
signals.recurrence: ongoing and continuous — flows are reported every trading day; multiple distinct streaks per year
leading_signals: consecutive-day net flow streak (sign and length)
single-day flow magnitude crossing prior records (>$1B in / >$500M out)
IBIT (BTC) / ETHA (ETH) flow dominance — the bellwether funds
rolling 5-day cumulative flow zscore
flow divergence from price (flows turning while price flat = leading signal)

signals.name: Converted legacy trust structural outflow (GBTC / ETHE)
signals.typical_lag: begins day 1 of conversion; heaviest in first 2-4 weeks
signals.typical_duration: front-loaded over ~6-10 weeks then decays to equilibrium
signals.recurrence: once per converted trust (GBTC Jan 2024, ETHE Jul 2024); a template for any future closed-end-to-ETF conversion
leading_signals: trust discount-to-NAV collapsing toward 0% pre-conversion (signals imminent arbitrage unwind)
trust fee far above competing ETFs (fee gap drives rotation)
daily trust outflow magnitude and its decay rate (slowing = exhaustion / bottoming signal)
trust AUM as % of total category AUM

signals.name: Algorithmic / reflexive death-spiral depeg
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours once the peg cracks; full collapse over 1-7 days
signals.typical_duration: terminal — days to a week to reach near-zero; no recovery
signals.recurrence: recurring; ~once every 6-18 months a notable algo design fails (2021 IRON, 2022 UST/USDD, 2025 xUSD/deUSD)
leading_signals: unsustainably high fixed yield (Anchor 19.5%, IRON farms hundreds of percent)
large single-address withdrawals from the anchor pool/farm
Curve/AMM pool tilting heavily to the stablecoin side
stablecoin trading 0.98-0.99 persistently before the break
concentration of backing in one risky counterparty (Stream Finance)
sister-token price rolling over while stablecoin still ~pegged

signals.name: Fiat/asset-backed reserve-shock depeg
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes-hours of disclosure); worst during banking off-hours / weekends
signals.typical_duration: hours to days; full recovery if reserves are real, permanent partial loss if not
signals.recurrence: recurring; clustered around banking/custodian stress events
affected_scope: stablecoins sharing its collateral (DAI, FRAX held USDC)
leading_signals: disclosure of reserve held at a stressed bank/custodian
issuer pausing or slowing redemptions
prominent insolvency accusation against the issuer
collateral concentration in illiquid/RWA assets vs cash
downstream protocols (Maker, Frax) carrying large balances of the coin

signals.name: Venue-specific liquidity-cascade flash depeg
signals.typical_lag: instantaneous wick; reverts in minutes to a few hours
signals.typical_duration: minutes to hours; usually fully recovered same day
signals.recurrence: frequent; minor venue wicks happen several times a year, severe ones during big liquidation cascades
leading_signals: market-wide forced-liquidation cascade in progress (Oct 10-11 2025)
single-venue order-book depth collapsing
AMM stable-pool weight skewing past ~70/30
high leverage / open interest using the stablecoin as margin
thin weekend/off-hours liquidity

signals.name: Net Mint Expansion (Dry-Powder Injection)
signals.typical_lag: minutes-to-hours on sentiment for large discrete mints; days-to-weeks for the aggregate-supply-growth trend to map onto price
signals.typical_duration: discrete mint pop fades within 24-72h; sustained net-supply expansion can fuel multi-week to multi-month uptrends
signals.recurrence: very frequent — discrete $1B+ USDT mints occur dozens of times per year; sustained-expansion regimes align with each major bull leg (2020-21, late-2024, 2025)
leading_signals: Tether Treasury / Circle mint transactions on-chain (Whale Alert tags)
30-day net change in aggregate stablecoin market cap turning positive / accelerating
USDT minted to Tron/Ethereum 'authorized but not issued' inventory then moved to exchanges
rising stablecoin balances on exchange hot wallets (exchange stablecoin reserves up)
stablecoin market-cap making new ATH while BTC consolidates

signals.name: Net Burn / Redemption Contraction
signals.typical_lag: coincident-to-lagging — supply contraction typically follows the price correction by days, confirming weakness rather than leading it
signals.typical_duration: weeks-to-months; supply contraction regimes persist through bear phases
signals.recurrence: occasional regime-level events — major contractions tied to 2022 bear market and acute redemption scares; routine small burns are frequent but low-signal
leading_signals: 30-day net change in aggregate stablecoin market cap turning negative
large USDT/USDC burns on-chain (Treasury redemptions)
exchange stablecoin reserves declining
USDT market cap falling sharply over days (mass redemption)
stablecoin supply rolling over after a parabolic expansion

signals.name: Stablecoin Depeg Shock (Backing-Doubt)
signals.typical_lag: immediate — the market reacts within minutes to hours of the depeg headline
signals.typical_duration: acute phase 24-72h; full peg recovery hours-to-days if backing is real, permanent if not (UST)
signals.recurrence: rare but high-impact — a handful of major events (UST May 2022, USDC Mar 2023, USDe Oct 2025); minor wobbles more frequent
leading_signals: stablecoin secondary-market price deviating >50bps from $1
issuer disclosure of reserve exposure to a stressed counterparty/bank
spiking redemption queue / mint-burn imbalance
Curve/DEX stablecoin pool imbalance (one coin dominating the pool)
rising funding-rate stress and CEX withdrawal spikes

signals.name: Low SSR / Loaded Exchange Reserves (Positioning Indicator)
signals.typical_lag: days-to-weeks — a positioning indicator, not a precise timing trigger
signals.typical_duration: the bullish deployment phase can run weeks-to-months once dry powder is confirmed loaded
signals.recurrence: cyclical — low-SSR readings clustered at the mid-2021, late-2022, and 2024 rebound phases
leading_signals: SSR falling to historically low band (cited ~13-21 range at cycle bottoms)
SSR oscillator below lower Bollinger band
rising exchange stablecoin reserves concurrent with low SSR (confirms accumulation vs outflow)
stablecoin market cap rising while BTC consolidates (SSR compressing for bullish reason)

signals.name: Moving-average regime cross (golden/death cross, 200-DMA loss/reclaim)
signals.typical_lag: lagging — the cross prints days-to-weeks AFTER the price move; the 200-DMA break itself reacts within hours
signals.typical_duration: regime label persists weeks to months; the acute stop-cascade on a 200-DMA loss plays out in 1-3 days
signals.recurrence: BTC has printed multiple death crosses 2018-2025; 200-DMA tested multiple times per cycle
leading_signals: 50-DMA flattening and converging toward 200-DMA
price closing below 200-DMA on rising volume
50/200 spread narrowing to within 1-2%
200-DMA slope turning negative

signals.name: Open-interest washout / forced-liquidation cascade
signals.typical_lag: immediate — minutes to hours; the full cascade often completes inside 24h
signals.typical_duration: acute crash 1-2 days; OI/leverage reset persists weeks; price often recovers a large fraction within 1-2 weeks
signals.recurrence: the largest cascades cluster ~1-2 per year, with the biggest in May 2021, Aug 2024, and Oct 2025
leading_signals: aggregate open interest at cycle highs
funding rate persistently positive/elevated
long/short ratio skewed heavily long
estimated-leverage-ratio rising
thin spot order-book depth into a macro catalyst

signals.name: On-chain valuation extreme (MVRV Z-score, realized price, NUPL, Pi-cycle)
signals.typical_lag: slow — signals fire days-to-weeks around tops/bottoms; full reversion plays out over months
signals.typical_duration: months; sub-1.0 MVRV windows lasted ~15 days (Mar 2020), ~178 days (2022), ~305 days (2018-19)
signals.recurrence: once or twice per ~4-year cycle for the full extreme
leading_signals: MVRV Z-score crossing above 7 (top) or MVRV ratio below 1 (bottom)
price crossing below realized price
NUPL entering 'euphoria' (>0.75) or 'capitulation' (<0)
Pi-cycle 111DMA crossing above 2x350DMA
long-term-holder supply distributing

signals.name: Funding-rate / leverage-sentiment extreme (contrarian)
signals.typical_lag: days to weeks — extreme funding flags fragility; the reversal follows on a catalyst
signals.typical_duration: the positioning unwind resolves over days once triggered; funding normalizes within a week of a washout
signals.recurrence: milder funding spikes several times a year; true multi-week extremes once or twice a cycle
leading_signals: funding rate sustained >0.1-0.3% per 8h for days/weeks (top warning)
funding deeply negative (bottom signal)
OI rising while funding rich
perp basis / annualized basis at extreme
long/short account ratio skewed

signals.name: Cliff Unlock (large discrete insider release)
signals.typical_lag: Pre-unlock drift begins 1-4 weeks ahead; the sharpest realized move is often 0-7 days AROUND the date, frequently bottoming on or just before the unlock (priced in)
signals.typical_duration: Acute pressure lasts days to ~2 weeks; persistent overhang on tokens with repeated large cliffs can suppress price for months
signals.recurrence: Per-token: usually a one-year initial cliff then periodic; across the market: dozens of large cliffs per year (every major 2021-2023 vintage L1/L2 token)
leading_signals: days_to_unlock counting down
unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply > 5%
rising perp open interest + negative funding pre-unlock (pre-hedging shorts)
negative price drift in the 2-4 weeks before the date
spike in exchange inflows from vesting/treasury wallets
low float / high FDV ratio at launch

signals.name: Continuous / Linear Vesting Emission
signals.typical_lag: Slow grind; modest -2% to -8% drift into each monthly date, frequent post-date relief bounce
signals.typical_duration: Structural — persists for the multi-year vesting horizon; per-event effect dissipates within days
signals.recurrence: Monthly/weekly per token, for 2-4 years — extremely high recurrence and thus the most backtestable sub-pattern
leading_signals: recurring unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply (monthly)
annualized emission/inflation rate
negative cumulative return in 5-10 days before each monthly date
weak relative strength vs sector
elevated perp short OI into the date

signals.name: Estate / Bankruptcy Locked-Token Distribution
signals.typical_lag: Often immediate relief on OTC sale announcement; the scheduled unlock itself is anticipated weeks ahead
signals.typical_duration: Multi-quarter overhang narrative; individual events resolve in days
signals.recurrence: Episodic — tied to specific estate proceedings (FTX 2024-2026 creditor rounds); rare but very large in notional
leading_signals: announced OTC discount % vs spot
named institutional buyer (signals smart-money demand)
scheduled creditor/vesting unlock date
estate wallet on-chain movements to exchanges
size of locked stack as % of circulating supply

signals.name: Exchange Netflow / Whale Deposit Signal (continuous flow)
signals.typical_lag: hours to 1-3 days
signals.typical_duration: intraday to 1 week
signals.recurrence: continuous — fires multiple times per month; the most repeatable, backtestable archetype in the category
leading_signals: 7-day MA of exchange inflows spikes above rolling mean (local-top marker)
exchange whale ratio rises above ~0.85
single large stablecoin deposit (e.g. >$1B USDT to Binance) — note unreliable as a directional signal
exchange reserves declining for weeks = supply squeeze/accumulation
Whale Alert flags of large BTC/ETH transfers TO exchange deposit wallets
backtest_features: large_transfer_count_to_exchange (>$1m tx tagged to CEX deposit addrs)

signals.name: Government / Seized-BTC Distribution (sovereign overhang)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to 24h on each transfer/headline; a transfer without a sale may produce no move
signals.typical_duration: days to several weeks (duration of the liquidation program)
signals.recurrence: episodic — a few major sovereign liquidations per cycle (Germany 2024, US Silk Road 2024-25, earlier US Marshals auctions)
leading_signals: court/forfeiture ruling clearing a government to sell (e.g. Dec 30 2024 Silk Road greenlight)
on-chain transfer from a known government-tagged wallet to an exchange or Coinbase Prime (transfer alone is not a sale)
size of remaining tagged government stash (overhang capping rallies)
Arkham/Whale Alert labels on sovereign addresses moving

signals.name: Mt Gox / Estate Creditor Repayment Overhang
signals.typical_lag: immediate to 24-48h on transfer/announcement headlines
signals.typical_duration: days per event; overhang persists across multiple deadline extensions (years)
signals.recurrence: episodic but recurring — clusters around each repayment announcement (Jun 2024 notice, Jul 2024 start, extensions)
leading_signals: trustee announcement of a repayment start/deadline date
on-chain movement of coins out of Mt Gox cold wallets to exchanges (Kraken/Bitstamp/BitGo)
BCH weakness leading BTC (creditors also received BCH)
size of BTC still in trustee custody (remaining overhang)
backtest_features: bch_btc_relative_drawdown (BCH sold harder than BTC by creditors)

signals.name: Dormant / Satoshi-Era Wallet Awakening
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes-hours) on the Whale Alert; full price resolution within 1-3 weeks as destination/intent clarifies
signals.typical_duration: intraday dip if benign; multi-week if confirmed distribution
signals.recurrence: sporadic — several notable awakenings per year; clustered in 2025 as OG holders exited near highs
leading_signals: Whale Alert / Arkham flag of a wallet last active 2010-2013 spending coins
Coin Days Destroyed (CDD) / dormant-supply-revived metric spike
destination address tagged to an exchange or OTC desk (e.g. Galaxy Digital) vs a fresh SegWit wallet
follow-on transfers within days (staged distribution) vs single move that then sits idle
